title: Idena Bubble Wrap for Shipping Protection - 40 cm x 10 m Roll - 70 μ - for Transportation - 10400 5 m x 40 cm 750mm x 50M White
features: On a roll, ideal for wrapping
Secure shock-absorbing layer and filling material
description: From the manufacturer The Idena brand fits perfectly with the entire family. Trendy ideas and the variety of products from the areas of office, school, creative play and design as well as festive decorating are the practical answer to daily family life. Send packages and packages on a safe journey Safely pack fragile items, such as glass and porcelain; tightly seal gifts, moving boxes, parcels and parcels and prepare them optimally for transport and shipping - with the Idena bubble wrap, packing tapes and parcel tape dispenser, everything is done quickly and easily. Always ready to use Optimal result with little time expenditure Useful everyday helpers in the home, office, when moving, in the garage, in the basement, in the attic or the workshop Idena bubble wrap Bubble wrap consists of a smooth cover film and a second layer, in which round air cushions are incorporated at regular intervals. They are elastic, tear-resistant and usually transparent. Suitable for the safe packaging of fragile or sensitive objects for insulation, dampening of impacts and for filling cavities. Can be torn off cleanly and straight in the transverse direction. Material: environmentally friendly polyethylene, recyclable. Available in the following versions: 40 cm x 5 m and 40 cm x 10 m Idena packing tape Adhesive and packing tapes are the all-rounder par excellence - practical and easy to use and very efficient because they stick quickly, safely and cleanly. They are available in different sizes, colours and in different designs for different areas (e.g. Motif tape, washi tape, double adhesive tape, universal tape, magnetic tape, etc.) Suitable for sealing packages, gluing paper and cardboard boxes and for minor repairs, thin with adhesive coating on one side, high adhesive effect and quiet unrolling. Available in brown and transparent Idena Parcel Tape Dispenser With this parcel tape dispenser, packages, boxes and boxes are quickly sealed airtight and opaque and the contents are protected from dirt and dust. It ensures safe and visually appealing bonding without much effort and saves valuable time when packing. Can be easily operated with just one hand. Suitable for tape rolls with a standard width of 50 mm. Serrated metal blade makes it easier to tear off the tape including a roll of brown packing tape
